items.name: Sketch Series
items.tagline: Loose line art with color pops.
items.description: Dynamic action poses rendered in loose, expressive line art with bold color pops. The energy of premium licensed athlete graphics — built around your photo.

items.name: Pixel Series
items.description: A clean 8-bit pixel portrait with nostalgic energy and premium execution. The retro collectible feel that's been dominating athlete merch — made for you.

items.name: Clean Series
items.description: A minimalist illustrated silhouette set against a large jersey number. Bold, refined, and timeless — the kind of merch that ends up framed on a wall.
